name: preview-frame
description: Bordered surface for previewing component recipes. Carries a data-theme attribute (light/dark) on the container. Toolbar with two toggle buttons in the top-right; JS flips data-theme and updates aria-pressed on each toggle.
html: {{content}}
aria: Each theme toggle button carries aria-pressed reflecting the active state. Update aria-pressed via JS when the theme changes. The preview frame itself is not a landmark — it is a visual container. The content inside it should carry its own appropriate landmark roles.
js_notes: JS reads data-ps-theme from the clicked button, sets data-theme on the parent .ps-preview, and updates aria-pressed on all sibling toggles. CSS rules scoped to [data-theme='dark'] override surface palette tokens.
